name: InnovAge Holding Corp.
business: InnovAge provides all-inclusive, capitated care to high-cost, dual-eligible seniors through the Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE). The company fulfills a broad range of medical and ancillary services, including primary care, in-home care, transportation, and care management. It directly contracts with government payors such as Medicare and Medicaid.

exposures.sentence: Our virtual care capabilities give us the flexibility to deliver medical care and social services virtually when appropriate.

catalysts.event: Entered into a joint venture with Tampa General Hospital to support Tampa PACE center
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we entered into a joint venture with Tampa General Hospital to support our Tampa PACE center.

catalysts.event: Completed acquisition of pharmacy assets from Tabula Rasa HealthCare Group
catalysts.sentence: On January 2, 2025, we completed the acquisition of certain pharmacy assets from Tabula Rasa HealthCare Group, Inc. (TRHC), a leading pharmacy care management company, for a total purchase price of $4.8 million.

catalysts.event: Entered into agreement to sell managing member interest in SH1 and adjacent land
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, the Company entered into an agreement to sell the Company’s managing member interest in SH1 and vacant land adjacent to SH1 senior housing property.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market opportunity of $265 billion based on 2.3 million PACE-eligible participants
tamClaims.sentence: Based on historical results for the year ended June 30, 2025 and our experience and industry knowledge, we estimate an average annual revenue opportunity of $115,000 per participant (or $9,600 PMPM) and a total addressable market opportunity of $265 billion, based on our estimated market of approximately 2.3 million PACE eligible participants in the United States in 2024, as described above.

tamClaims.claim: Only approximately 85,000 of the 2.3 million eligible participants are enrolled in a PACE program
tamClaims.sentence: Of these estimated PACE eligible participants, only approximately 85,000 are enrolled in a PACE program, based on a June 2025 report from the National PACE Association.
